title: transaction — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families for live UI updates. Tenant-level channel for the transaction ledger view; ledger-level channel for the per-account balance dashboard; reconciliation channel for the ops queue showing reconciler runs + imbalance detections. Reverb driver (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.transactions
channels.description: Tenant-wide transaction ledger activity. Sink for the transaction ledger dashboard showing real-time transaction posts + reversals.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (admin OR finance_role)
channels.notes: Amount + currency are visible to admin + finance role. Support role does NOT subscribe to this channel — they use the platform plane cross-tenant view instead.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.ledger
channels.description: Per-account balance activity. Powers the per-account running-balance widget + threshold-crossing indicator in the ledger dashboard.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (admin OR finance_role)
channels.notes: Ledger entry payloads carry debit_cents + credit_cents — the front-end UI can compute the delta + apply it to the cached balance. Support role does NOT subscribe (they see aggregated balances only via the platform view).

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.ledger.reconciliation
channels.description: Reconciler activity + imbalance alerts. Powers the ops queue view showing nightly reconciler runs + any detected imbalances.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (admin OR finance_role)
channels.notes: Every LedgerImbalanceDetected fires a companion push notification via the notifications module (cannot-opt-out). The channel is for the UI live-update; the notification is for the human alert (pages on-call). Regulator-critical — every fire also writes to audits with 7-year retention.
